name: Add or Edit Website Menus
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Menus allow customers to navigate products and pages on your website. All menus can be created and managed in your Neto control panel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": "add-a-link-to-a-menu"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Menus", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the menu that you want to edit by clicking on the ID or reference name for the menu you want to edit."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reference"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "web_header"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This menu appears at the top of every page on your website."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "web_information"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This menu appears in the body of your website."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "web_footer"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This menu appears at the bottom of every page on your website."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-4a0815af"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To add a link to an existing menu, simply click the "}, {"text": "Add New Menu Item", "bold": true}, {"text": " at the bottom of the menu list."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the cog icon to add links for this menu option. A pop-up window will appear."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus2.05T5g00000tx9SfEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus2.05T5g00000tx9SfEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the name of the new menu option under "}, {"text": "Item Name", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link to a URL", "bold": true}, {"text": " - to enter a web address for an external website. Paste the web address in the field below."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link to an existing product", "bold": true}, {"text": " - link to product page. Enter the product's SKU in the field below."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link to an existing stockist", "bold": true}, {"text": " - links to a stockist or store location. Select store from the drop down list below."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Blog Post", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Brand", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Buying Guide", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Form", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Information Page", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Product Category", "bold": true}, {"text": " - links to a page with that content type. Select page from the drop down menu below."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Query String", "bold": true}, {"text": " is an advanced feature. Use it to add parameters to the menu web address. If unsure, leave this blank."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "CSS Class", "bold": true}, {"text": " is an advanced feature. This can be used by web designers to change the way the menu option looks on the web page. If unsure, leave this blank."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can hide a menu option by unchecking "}, {"text": "Visible on Website", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Under "}, {"text": "Select URL for menu item", "bold": true}, {"text": " select:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To add a sub-menu option, click on the plus."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To remove a menu option, click on the cross."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Accept", "bold": true}, {"text": " to save the option settings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To change the order of the menu options, click and drag the menu option up or down. Let go of the mouse button when it's in the correct position. To create a sub-menu option, drag the option to the right so it is indented."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus3.05T5g00000tx9bAEAQ.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus3.05T5g00000tx9bAEAQ.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 229}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to confirm your changes."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now check your website to see how the menu looks."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus4.05T5g00000tx9xtEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddorEditWebsiteMenus4.05T5g00000tx9xtEAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 263}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Edit a Product Category Menu"}], "data-id": "edit-a-product-category-menu"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On most themes, category menus are automatically generated based on your category tree. Some themes may limit the amount of categories that display."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To edit your product category menu in your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you've updated your categories and the menu has still not updated, it could be a result of caching. In the left hand navigation menu, click the "}, {"text": "Refresh Caches", "bold": true}, {"text": " link at the bottom."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
